Crank (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $27,838,408Details
International Box Office $16,086,515
Worldwide Box Office $43,924,923
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $29,567,370
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $77,184
Total $29,644,554
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,457,367 (37.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.66 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:63.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$12,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,515 opening theaters/2,515 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $50,831,662

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 1st, 2006 (Wide) by Lionsgate
Video Release: January 9th, 2007 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong violence, pervasive language, sexuality, nudity and drug use.
Running Time: 88 minutes
Franchise: Crank
Plot point: Crime Boss, Hitmen, No Honor Among Thieves, Revenge, Surprise Twist, Triads
Social setting: Organized Crime
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Lakeshore Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
